3049840.name: Dating and Dragons - A Love Quest
3049840.description:
Dating & Dragons – A Love Quest is a narrative RPG dating sim packed with every fantasy trope you love. Sneak out with the thief, wreak havoc with the warrior, or flirt with the bard. Explore branching adventures with multiple endings and hidden secrets. Roll those dice and watch out for dragons! 

  • Pick one of four playable characters.

  • Select an adventure from the quest board.

  • Assemble your party with one or more of the six Love Interests.

  • Face the dungeon: monsters, traps, and the mandatory steamy scene at the camp await.

  • Your actions will determine the outcome of the mission... and whether your date falls in love with you!

  • Unlock bonus collectables and start a new adventure: there are many to explore!

  • Didn't succeed? No worries! Play again and your newly unlocked goodies and knowledge will help you in the next Love Quest!

Fast-paced adventures full of witty dialogue, cheesy romance with 6 love interests, and dozens of relatable moments every RPG fan will appreciate.

Expect the unexpected and find every secret in this goofy adventure. Use your items wisely, choose the right options, be blessed -or cursed- by the dice Gods, and who knows what might happen!

All is fair in love and war. Choose how to overcome the challenges or flirt with your date. Your decisions determine which ending you get, but don’t worry, there is no wrong option if you expect to have fun!

What better place for a date than a dungeon? Mind the traps, be wary of biting chests, and defeat your foes while looking amazing in front of your crush. In these rooms, you will find:

  • Encounters, with all kinds of foes. From simple skeletons or slimes to the most feared monster of any TTRPG player: doors.

  • Treasure, gold, gems, magic items, trinkets... Make sure to loot it all, they might come in handy during your adventures.

  • Traps! Be sure to watch your step, you don’t want to end up electrocuted by a magical lightning trap, right?

  • Heated, romantic, and goofy scenes. This is a dating sim, after all! And well, these are dungeons, if you catch my drift ;)

The world is filled with 100+ items to aid you during your adventures. Loot your fallen enemies, or receive blessings from your deities - if you have any!

Unlock special feats as you play. Experiment and find the best way to seduce your way to victory and true love!

There are many reasons to keep playing Dating & Dragons over and over again!

Each Player Character has their own unique dialogue lines, scenes, and hidden interactions with the Love Interests. Find signature items and feats specially tailored to specific dungeons, characters, or both. Unlock unique dice skins at the end of each route. And most importantly: will you find the dragon?
3049840.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
